nodes.title: Render Agent List
nodes.description: When agent list panel renders. Displays list of agents with columns: Name, Branch, Status, Output preview. Selected agent highlighted. Shows empty state 'No agents' when list empty.

nodes.title: Render Output View
nodes.description: When user selects agent. Displays real-time output buffer in scrollable view. Shows ANSI color codes rendered. Auto-scrolls to bottom when new output arrives.

nodes.title: Navigate Agent List
nodes.description: When user presses j/k or arrow keys. Moves selection up/down in agent list. Wraps at top/bottom. Shows selected agent details in output view.

nodes.title: Show Help Overlay
nodes.description: When user presses '?'. Displays full keyboard shortcuts overlay with categories. Press 'q' or Escape to close. Shows all available keybinds.

nodes.title: Show Settings
nodes.description: When user presses 'S'. Opens settings modal with tabs: General, Keybinds, Appearance. Changes apply immediately. Press Escape to close.

nodes.title: Render Status Bar
nodes.description: When status bar renders. Shows: Git branch, repo info, system metrics (CPU/Memory), current time. Positioned at bottom of screen.

nodes.title: Show Diff View
nodes.description: When user presses '/'. Toggles diff view panel showing uncommitted changes. Uses git diff output. Side-by-side or unified view toggle.

nodes.title: Show Toast
nodes.description: When action completes (copy, push, etc). Displays toast notification at bottom of screen. Auto-dismisses after 3 seconds. Types: success (green), error (red), info (blue).

nodes.title: Render Task List
nodes.description: When user presses 't'. Toggles task list modal showing linked tasks from project management. Columns: Task ID, Title, Status, Assignee. Click to open in browser.

nodes.title: Show Log View
nodes.description: When user presses 'L'. Toggles log view overlay showing Grove application logs. Filterable by level: error, warn, info, debug. Shows timestamps.

nodes.title: Render System Metrics
nodes.description: When system metrics panel renders. Shows real-time CPU usage percentage and Memory usage percentage. Updates every second. Displayed in status bar or dedicated panel.
